title: Column_values for "New Item/Pulse in Board" trigger not working any more on Zapier site

posts.author: engrswadood (Sultan Wadood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
We do not receive column_values for “New Item/Pulse in Board” trigger on Zapier site but only IDs/Names.
Column_values were being recieved very well before for “New Pulse on a Board in monday.com (Legacy)” trigger.
How can this issue be fixed?
Thanks in advance
